name: If My Wife Becomes an Elementary School Student
overview: A story that begins when a husband, who lost his beloved wife ten years ago and lost the meaning of life,  and his daughter are unexpectedly reunited with their wife/mother. As his wife is reborn as a ten-year-old elementary school student, the family is reborn.

trailers.title: [新金曜ドラマ]『妻、小学生になる。』家族の時間が 再び動き出す!! 1月21日スタート【TBS】
